twitch_info.title: Did I download the right game?

message.body: Echo_Mask is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: Did I download the right game?
never in my whole carrier I clicked the stream link that quick
I got this sound effect from one of the machine girl songs 🐸
ThisWontAJWell subscribed with Prime. They've subscribed for 2 months! goober gaming goober gaming

can't wait to watch you beat this in 1/4 the time I did
you can also do it while playing the game 🐸
also you should take screenshots for delfruit :)

unless they're also arked as a virus by now
it depends when you create them, and how windows updates by then handles them
hey echomask, do you wanna join the Kill All Kevins initiative
and as of right now, windows markes single .exes as viruses, thats why u do zip
i mean its just an ez fix right? just updating the link file
Thank god windows is protecting us from all of the scary sonics ❤️🔥
